mapper.sql: p.PAGE_ID AS pageId, p.PAGE_NAME AS pageName, p.VIEW_MODE AS viewMode, p.CREATE_USER_NAME AS createUserName, p.APPROVE_STATE AS approveState, p.IS_PUBLIC AS isPublic, TO_CHAR(p.BEGINNING_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS beginningDate, TO_CHAR(p.EXPIRED_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS expiredDate, TO_CHAR(p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS lastModifiedDtime, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE_HISTORY h WHERE h.PAGE_ID = p.PAGE_ID ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS hasApproveHistory, CASE WHEN p.IS_PUBLIC = 'N' AND p.EXPIRED_DATE IS NOT NULL AND p.EXPIRED_DATE < SYSDATE THEN '만료' WHEN p.IS_PUBLIC = 'N' THEN '비공개' ELSE p.APPROVE_STATE END AS displayState

choose.when: ORDER BY p.PAGE_NAME ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY p.VIEW_MODE ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY p.CREATE_USER_NAME ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY p.APPROVE_STATE ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY p.IS_PUBLIC ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY p.BEGINNING_DATE ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY p.EXPIRED_DATE ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND PAGE_TYPE = 'PAGE'
mapper.update:
UPDATE SPW_CMS_PAGE SET APPROVE_STATE = 'APPROVED',
BEGINNING_DATE = CASE WHEN #{beginningDate} IS NOT NULL THEN TO_DATE(#{beginningDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ELSE NULL END, EXPIRED_DATE = CASE WHEN #{expiredDate} IS NOT NULL THEN TO_DATE(#{expiredDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ELSE NULL END, APPROVE_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP, LAST_MODIFIER_ID = #{modifierId} WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId} AND APPROVE_STATE = 'PENDING' AND PAGE_TYPE = 'PAGE'

UPDATE SPW_CMS_PAGE SET APPROVE_STATE = 'REJECTED', REJECTED_REASON = #{rejectedReason}, APPROVE_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP, LAST_MODIFIER_ID = #{modifierId} WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId} AND APPROVE_STATE = 'PENDING' AND PAGE_TYPE = 'PAGE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SPW_CMS_PAGE_HISTORY ( PAGE_ID, VERSION, PAGE_NAME, OWNER_DEPT_CODE, FILE_PATH, PAGE_HTML, CREATE_USER_ID, CREATE_USER_NAME, LAST_MODIFIER_ID, LAST_MODIFIER_NAME, APPROVER_ID, APPROVER_NAME, CREATE_DATE, CONFIRM_DTIME, BEGINNING_DATE, EXPIRED_DATE, APPROVE_STATE, LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME, PAGE_DESC, PAGE_DESC_DETAIL, TEMPLATE_ID, THUMBNAIL, VIEW_MODE, USER_GUIDE, FILE_PATH_BACK, REJECTED_REASON, USE_YN, IS_PUBLIC, APPROVE_DATE, FILE_CRC_VALUE, FINAL_APPROVAL_STATE, FINAL_APPROVAL_DTIME, FINAL_APPROVAL_USER_ID, FINAL_APPROVAL_USER_NAME ) SELECT PAGE_ID, #{version}, PAGE_NAME, OWNER_DEPT_CODE, FILE_PATH, PAGE_HTML, CREATE_USER_ID, CREATE_USER_NAME, LAST_MODIFIER_ID, LAST_MODIFIER_NAME, APPROVER_ID, APPROVER_NAME, CREATE_DATE, CONFIRM_DTIME, BEGINNING_DATE, EXPIRED_DATE, APPROVE_STATE, LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME, PAGE_DESC, PAGE_DESC_DETAIL, TEMPLATE_ID, THUMBNAIL, VIEW_MODE, USER_GUIDE, FILE_PATH_BACK, REJECTED_REASON, USE_YN, IS_PUBLIC, APPROVE_DATE, FILE_CRC_VALUE, FINAL_APPROVAL_STATE, FINAL_APPROVAL_DTIME, FINAL_APPROVAL_USER_ID, FINAL_APPROVAL_USER_NAME FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId}
mapper.select: SELECT h.VERSION AS version, h.APPROVE_STATE AS approveState, h.LAST_MODIFIER_NAME AS lastModifierName, TO_CHAR(h.APPROVE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS approveDate FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE_HISTORY h WHERE h.PAGE_ID = #{pageId} ORDER BY h.VERSION DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE SPW_CMS_PAGE SET PAGE_HTML = #{pageHtml}, FILE_PATH = #{filePath}, APPROVE_STATE = 'WORK', LAST_MODIFIER_ID = #{modifierId} WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND PAGE_TYPE = 'PAGE'
